name: Chart
description: A flexible React chart component built on D3 that renders various chart types (line, bar, area, scatter, pie, etc.) using a declarative ChartData configuration. Automatically handles window resize, exposes a reflow imperative handle, and fires onReady/onResize callbacks with current dimensions.
when_to_use: When building data visualizations without needing the plugin abstraction of ChartKit
For direct D3-based chart rendering with full TypeScript types
When responsive auto-resize behavior is required
avoid: When Yagr-style canvas-based performance is needed for large timeseries — use Yagr instead
When chart type is managed through a plugin registry — use ChartKit instead

props.name: data
props.description: Declarative chart configuration and series data

props.name: onResize
props.description: Called on every resize event with current dimensions

props.name: onReady
props.description: Called when chart is fully initialized

ref: ChartRef — exposes reflow(options?: ChartReflowOptions) to trigger a manual resize update
